message:
feat(server): graceful drain orchestration with shutdown statistics

connection.rs:
- Add #[must_use] to register() since callers must hold the
  ConnectionGuard to keep the registration alive
- Explicitly drop connections lock after insert to minimize hold time
- Add drain_with_stats() async method that orchestrates graceful drain
  with timeout: waits for connections to close, transitions to
  force-close phase on deadline expiry, returns ShutdownStats with
  drained vs force-closed counts

shutdown.rs:
- Expand ShutdownSignal with drain_deadline(), begin_force_close(),
  mark_stopped(), and collect_stats() methods to support the
  multi-phase shutdown protocol (Running → Draining → ForceClosing →
  Stopped)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
